---
title: 'HW 9: Running, Plotting, and Interpreting 2 Way Continuous x Continuous Interactions
  Part I'
author: "Debi Gonzalez"
date: "2026-03-26"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


```{r}
# Loading dataset
am_data <- read.csv("/Users/debig/Documents/PhD Y1/Stats II/Quant II Projects/HW 6 Multiple Regression with Two Predictors in R/academicMotivation.csv")

model_am <- lm(academicMotivation ~ hrs*advisorSupport, am_data)
summary(model_am)


mean_advisorSupport <- mean(am_data$advisorSupport)
sd_advisorSupport <- sd(am_data$advisorSupport)

mean_advisorSupport
sd_advisorSupport
```
